canvas-mist.$description: Canvas Mist — Page background, dominant surface across hero and surrounding space

carbon-black.$description: Carbon Black — Dark supporting neutral for text, icons, and strong contrast. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

pure-white.$description: Pure White — Elevated card surface (app window mockup), inverse text on dark buttons

graphite.$description: Graphite — Secondary dark surfaces, icon strokes, muted dark UI elements

pale-stone.$description: Pale Stone — Hairline borders, dividers, secondary card backgrounds

silver-mist.$description: Silver Mist — Muted backgrounds, disabled states, low-emphasis surfaces

apple-system-blinkmacsystemfont-segoe-ui.$description: Primary interface typeface — used for everything from the 28px bold brand wordmark to the 12px 800-weight button label and meta tags. The exclusive use of weights 700 and 800 (plus 500 for the smallest tag) is the signature: no thin or regular weights appear anywhere. Combined with -0.036em tracking on the 28px size, headlines feel mechanically precise rather than elegant.

ui-monospace-sf-mono-menlo-monospace.$description: Reserved for single-character or ultra-short technical labels (e.g. the leading icon glyph in the waiting-list card). Monospace at weight 800 at 12px reads as a stamped serial number rather than body text.

page-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Dominant background for the entire viewport — the cool light gray stage on which the disc floats

app-window-surface.$description: Surface level 1: Elevated white card containing the brand name and CTA — the only surface above the canvas

primary-action.$description: Surface level 2: Black button surface — sits on top of the white card, creating the page's only stacked contrast moment
